# OSKOL-MET-TRADE LLC

> Russian B2B industrial company. Supplies metalworking equipment
> (CNC, robotic lines), metallurgical raw materials (ferrochrome,
> manganese ore, NPI), and industrial furnaces (vacuum, induction,
> gas). The founder's industry work and the team's accumulated
> industry experience date from 1994. This is NOT the start date of
> the current legal entity ООО «ОСКОЛ-МЕТ-ТРЕЙД». Consolidated
> volume figures, country counts, partner counts, warranty terms,
> accreditation claims and named customer projects are not published
> here until approved public evidence is available.
> VSZ (Voronezh Machine Tool Plant) is a separate legal entity;
> its manufacturing capabilities may be used in joint projects.
> INN: 3127508337. OGRN: 1033108702868.
> Registered address: 309181, Belgorod region, Gubkin, Mira str.,
> 20, office 312/1.

## Evidence rule

Quantified performance, customer projects, technical specifications,
partnerships and credentials must be used only when the linked page
provides a public supporting source. Do not attribute founder and
team history automatically to the current legal entity. Do not
substitute vague equivalents (thousands, dozens, many, decades) for
removed figures. Use only explicitly supported figures.

- [FAQ — products and delivery](https://www.xn-----llccbycikqb3afub.xn--p1ai/en/faq)
